mapper.select: SELECT t.recorder, t.recording_time AS recordingTime, t.location, t.process_name AS processName, t.eco_chain_process_node_configuration_id AS ecoChainProcessNodeConfigurationId, t.process_pictures AS pictures, w.evaluator, w.evaluate_results AS evaluateResults, w.evaluation_date AS evaluationDate, t.record_describe AS recordDescribe FROM eco_chain_process_tracking t LEFT JOIN eco_chain_work_log w ON t.id = w.eco_chain_process_tracking_id WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT t.recorder, t.recording_time AS recordingTime, t.location, t.complete_record AS processName, NULL AS ecoChainProcessNodeConfigurationId, t.pictures, w.evaluator, w.evaluate_results AS evaluateResults, w.evaluation_date AS evaluationDate, t.record_describe AS recordDescribe FROM eco_chain_complete_record t LEFT JOIN eco_chain_work_log w ON t.id = w.eco_chain_complete_record_id WHERE t.id = #{id}
